commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f795eb7e63d1040beeeeba62b1d8ceb010492bd1)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an empty-state note to the Skills configuration wizard when there are no missing skill dependencies to install.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection, with medium confidence: current main can reach the confirmed Skills configuration path with installable.length 0 and missing.length 0, then return without a follow-up note or selection UI. I did not run the interactive command because this review is read-only and local test execution could write artifacts.
commands.review_followup: Contributor-supplied real behavior proof is required, and automation cannot prove the contributor's patched local setup for them.

target.title: fix: show empty-state note in Skills wizard when no deps are missing
target.body:
## Summary

When all skills are eligible and no dependencies are missing, `openclaw config --section skills` counts eligible skills but presents a bare "Configure skills now?" confirmation with no follow-through — the wizard appears broken.

This adds an explicit empty-state note when `installable.length === 0 && missing.length === 0`, pointing users to `openclaw skills list --verbose` and `openclaw skills check` before returning.

Closes #85015

## Verification

- Source: `src/commands/onboard-skills.ts` — 11-line addition between `let next` and `if (installable.length > 0)`
- `formatCliCommand` already imported and used elsewhere in the file
- `prompter.note` is the same UI primitive used for the status summary above
- No config semantics change — purely a UX improvement for the all-ready edge case

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior addressed: Skills wizard shows eligible count but no action when all skills are ready
- Real environment tested: Source-level verification against current main (9f2c0a8)
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `openclaw config --section skills` with all skills eligible → now shows "No missing skill dependencies to install." note with CLI hints
- Evidence after fix: Empty state is clearly communicated instead of silently skipping
- What was not tested: Live gateway with patch applied (fork PR)
target.author: julyanxu
